AbortMultipartUpload.description: Grants permission to abort a multipart upload

CreateAccessPoint.description: Grants permission to create a new access point

CreateBucket.description: Grants permission to create a new bucket

CreateEndpoint.description: Grants permission to create a new endpoint

DeleteAccessPoint.description: Grants permission to delete the access point named in the URI

DeleteAccessPointPolicy.description: Grants permission to delete the policy on a specified access point

DeleteBucket.description: Grants permission to delete the bucket named in the URI

DeleteBucketPolicy.description: Grants permission to delete the policy on a specified bucket

DeleteEndpoint.description: Grants permission to delete the endpoint named in the URI

DeleteObject.description: Grants permission to remove the null version of an object and insert a delete marker, which becomes the current version of the object

DeleteObjectTagging.description: Grants permission to use the tagging subresource to remove the entire tag set from the specified object

DeleteObjectVersion.description: Grants permission to remove a specific version of an object

DeleteObjectVersionTagging.description: Grants permission to remove the entire tag set for a specific version of the object

GetAccessPoint.description: Grants permission to return configuration information about the specified access point

GetAccessPointPolicy.description: Grants permission to returns the access point policy associated with the specified access point

GetBucket.description: Grants permission to return the bucket configuration associated with an Amazon S3 bucket

GetBucketPolicy.description: Grants permission to return the policy of the specified bucket

GetBucketTagging.description: Grants permission to return the tag set associated with an Amazon S3 bucket

GetBucketVersioning.description: Grants permission to return the versioning state of an Amazon S3 bucket

GetLifecycleConfiguration.description: Grants permission to return the lifecycle configuration information set on an Amazon S3 bucket

GetObject.description: Grants permission to retrieve objects from Amazon S3

GetObjectTagging.description: Grants permission to return the tag set of an object

GetObjectVersion.description: Grants permission to retrieve a specific version of an object

GetObjectVersionForReplication.description: Grants permission to replicate both unencrypted objects and objects encrypted with SSE-KMS

GetObjectVersionTagging.description: Grants permission to return the tag set for a specific version of the object

GetReplicationConfiguration.description: Grants permission to get the replication configuration information set on an Amazon S3 bucket

ListAccessPoints.description: Grants permission to list access points

ListBucket.description: Grants permission to list some or all of the objects in an Amazon S3 bucket (up to 1000)

ListBucketMultipartUploads.description: Grants permission to list in-progress multipart uploads

ListBucketVersions.description: Grants permission to list metadata about all the versions of objects in an Amazon S3 bucket

ListMultipartUploadParts.description: Grants permission to list the parts that have been uploaded for a specific multipart upload

ListOutpostsWithS3.description: Grants permission to list outposts with S3 capacity

ListRegionalBuckets.description: Grants permission to list all buckets owned by the authenticated sender of the request

ListSharedEndpoints.description: Grants permission to list shared endpoints

PutAccessPointPolicy.description: Grants permission to associate an access policy with a specified access point

PutBucketPolicy.description: Grants permission to add or replace a bucket policy on a bucket

PutBucketTagging.description: Grants permission to add a set of tags to an existing Amazon S3 bucket

PutBucketVersioning.description: Grants permission to set the versioning state of an existing Amazon S3 bucket

PutLifecycleConfiguration.description: Grants permission to create a new lifecycle configuration for the bucket or replace an existing lifecycle configuration

PutObject.description: Grants permission to add an object to a bucket

PutObjectAcl.description: Grants permission to set the access control list (ACL) permissions for an object that already exists in a bucket

PutObjectTagging.description: Grants permission to set the supplied tag-set to an object that already exists in a bucket

PutObjectVersionTagging.description: Grants permission to set the supplied tag-set for a specific version of an object

PutReplicationConfiguration.description: Grants permission to create a new replication configuration or replace an existing one

ReplicateDelete.description: Grants permission to replicate delete markers to the destination bucket

ReplicateObject.description: Grants permission to replicate objects and object tags to the destination bucket

ReplicateTags.description: Grants permission to replicate object tags to the destination bucket

s3-outposts:AccessPointNetworkOrigin.description: Filters access by the network origin (Internet or VPC)

s3-outposts:DataAccessPointAccount.description: Filters access by the AWS Account ID that owns the access point

s3-outposts:DataAccessPointArn.description: Filters access by an access point Amazon Resource Name (ARN)

s3-outposts:ExistingObjectTag/<key>.description: Filters access by requiring that an existing object tag has a specific tag key and value

s3-outposts:RequestObjectTag/<key>.description: Filters access by restricting the tag keys and values allowed on objects

s3-outposts:RequestObjectTagKeys.description: Filters access by restricting the tag keys allowed on objects

s3-outposts:authType.description: Filters access by restricting incoming requests to a specific authentication method

s3-outposts:delimiter.description: Filters access by requiring the delimiter parameter

s3-outposts:max-keys.description: Filters access by limiting the maximum number of keys returned in a ListBucket request

s3-outposts:prefix.description: Filters access by key name prefix

s3-outposts:signatureAge.description: Filters access by identifying the length of time, in milliseconds, that a signature is valid in an authenticated request

s3-outposts:signatureversion.description: Filters access by identifying the version of AWS Signature that is supported for authenticated requests

s3-outposts:versionid.description: Filters access by a specific object version

s3-outposts:x-amz-acl.description: Filters access by requiring the x-amz-acl header with a specific canned ACL in a request

s3-outposts:x-amz-content-sha256.description: Filters access by disallowing unsigned content in your bucket

s3-outposts:x-amz-copy-source.description: Filters access by restricting the copy source to a specific bucket, prefix, or object

s3-outposts:x-amz-metadata-directive.description: Filters access by enabling enforcement of object metadata behavior (COPY or REPLACE) when objects are copied

s3-outposts:x-amz-server-side-encryption.description: Filters access by requiring server-side encryption
